name: roslyn-mcp
description: Semantic C# analysis and refactoring for AI agents, powered by Roslyn. Load .sln/.csproj files and get 147 tools plus MCP prompts; 19 bundled agent skills cover analysis, refactor, tests, MSBuild inspection, session undo, and release workflows.

ROSLYNMCP_RATE_LIMIT_MAX_REQUESTS.title: Rate Limit
ROSLYNMCP_RATE_LIMIT_MAX_REQUESTS.description: Maximum tool invocations per sliding window (default: 120)

ROSLYNMCP_REQUEST_TIMEOUT_SECONDS.title: Request Timeout
ROSLYNMCP_REQUEST_TIMEOUT_SECONDS.description: Per-request timeout for tool invocations in seconds (default: 120)
